Package noppes.npcs.api.ability

Interface IAbilityAction

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    IAbility, IAbilityCharge, IAbilityCounter, IAbilityCutter, IAbilityDash, IAbilityDefend, IAbilityDisc, IAbilityDodge, IAbilityEffect, IAbilityEnergyBeam, IAbilityEnergyProjectile, IAbilityGuard, IAbilityHazard, IAbilityHeavyHit, IAbilityLaser, IAbilityOrb, IAbilityProjectile, IAbilityShockwave, IAbilitySlam, IAbilitySweeper, IAbilityTeleport, IAbilityTrap, IAbilityVortex, IAbilityZone, IChainedAbility, ICustomAbility
    public interface IAbilityAction
    Common API interface for all combat actions (abilities and chained abilities). Both IAbility and IChainedAbility extend this interface.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      int getCooldownTicks()  
      float getMaxRange()  
      float getMinRange()  
      String getName()  
      int getWeight()  
      boolean isChain()  
      boolean isEnabled()  

    • Method Detail

      • getName

        String getName()
        Returns:
        The unique identifier/name of this action.

      • isEnabled

        boolean isEnabled()
        Returns:
        Whether this action is enabled.

      • getWeight

        int getWeight()
        Returns:
        Selection weight for random ability selection (higher = more likely).

      • getCooldownTicks

        int getCooldownTicks()
        Returns:
        Cooldown duration in ticks after this action is used.

      • getMinRange

        float getMinRange()
        Returns:
        Minimum range in blocks at which this action can be used.

      • getMaxRange

        float getMaxRange()
        Returns:
        Maximum range in blocks at which this action can be used.

      • isChain

        boolean isChain()
        Returns:
        Whether this action is a chained ability (sequence) vs an individual ability.
